  "findings": [
    "Permit expired mid-shift while work was actively in progress inside the confined space",
    "Unauthorized entry/work continuing under an expired permit"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Evacuate all personnel from the confined space immediately",
    "Cancel the expired permit and terminate the entry operation",
    "Perform atmospheric testing and re-evaluate hazards",
    "Issue a new confined space entry permit before anyone re-enters"
  ],
  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1910.146, working inside a permit-required confined space with an expired permit is a critical safety violation. All work must stop immediately, entrants must evacuate, and a new permit must be issued and signed by the entry supervisor before work can resume.",

    "OSHA 1910.146(e)(1)",
    "OSHA 1910.146(e)(5)"
  ]
